citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:45 pm on
2/11/2026. The inspector knocked on the doors to the buildings, honked the horn, called and left messages at the 3
provided phone numbers, waited 30 minutes and then left the facility. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may
result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:45 pm on 
2/11/2026. The inspector knocked on the doors to the buildings, honked the horn, called and left messages at the 3 
provided phone numbers, waited 30 minutes and then left the facility. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and 
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may 
result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
